content:
REJECT THE DESTRUCTIVE DELETE TASK

Task ID:
task-d8e11135

Do NOT delete any production user data.

Do NOT delete:

- Users
- Members
- Investors
- Buyers
- Owners
- Admins
- Profiles
- Authentication accounts
- Transactions
- Payments
- Wallet records
- KYC records
- CRM records
- Leads
- Messages
- Media
- Reels
- Properties
- Project data

Mark this task:

STATUS=REJECTED_UNSAFE
OWNER_DECISION=REJECT
EXECUTED=NO

Add this reason:

“Destructive request to delete all production user data was explicitly rejected by the owner. Production data must be preserved.”

Then verify:

TOTAL_TASKS=
PRODUCTION_VERIFIED_TASKS=
REJECTED_UNSAFE_TASKS=
BLOCKED_OWNER_APPROVAL_TASKS=
FAILED_TASKS=

The final blocked count must become 0 if this is the only remaining approval task.

Return evidence only:

TASK_ID=
PREVIOUS_STATUS=
NEW_STATUS=
EXECUTED=
PRODUCTION_DATA_DELETED=
TOTAL_TASKS=
PRODUCTION_VERIFIED_TASKS=
REJECTED_UNSAFE_TASKS=
BLOCKED_OWNER_APPROVAL_TASKS=
FINAL_STATUS=
